_comment: Positives describe deploying skills to tools via wrappers/symlinks; negatives lean on sibling capabilities or are out of scope.
positive: Deploy a skill to an AI tool
Set up deployment pointers with symlinks
Set up wrapper files and symlinks
Deploy skills to Claude with symlinks
Install the skill into AI tools
negative: Bundle the skill into a zip
Convert a flat skill into the router pattern
Write effective skill descriptions and manifests
